hypothesis: Sprint 3 lever 3 (paraphrase augmentation, H4) — s3-d3 left -0.047 on keyword queries and slightly under base on fact_pattern (though d3 beat base on fact_pattern overall). Both deficits look like training/eval distribution mismatch: training questions are FPPC-author NL paraphrases of conclusions; eval includes keyword bags and multi-sentence fact patterns. Augment training with 1000 stratified rows * 2 paraphrase shapes (keyword + fact_pattern) = 2000 synthetic queries, generated by gemma4:e4b via local Ollama. Mix with original 8949 training rows (no replacement). If keyword queries recover, H4 confirmed and we have a stronger overall model.
